export default function MDXContent({
  components,
  ...props
}) {
  return <MDXLayout {...layoutProps} {...props} components={components} mdxType="MDXLayout">


    <p>{`The following section details how to create a link in the Virtual Assistant that will link to a page in IBM® Cúram Social Program Management. In this example a URL link is configured in a dialog skill to link to the person notes list page.`}</p>
    <ol>
      <li parentName="ol">
        <p parentName="li">{`Log into `}<a parentName="p" {...{
            "href": "https://cloud.ibm.com"
          }}>{`IBM Cloud`}</a>{`.`}</p>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ol">
        <p parentName="li">{`Select ‘Launch Watson Assistant’.`}</p>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ol">
        <p parentName="li">{`Select the chatbot dialog skill created.`}</p>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ol">
        <p parentName="li">{`Create a new intent and enter the intent name, for example `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`#SPL_See_The_Case_Notes_Link`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</p>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ol">
        <p parentName="li">{`Add a new dialog node to the skills.`}</p>
        <ul parentName="li">
          <li parentName="ul">{`Enter the node name, for example `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`See The Case Notes Link`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
          <li parentName="ul">{`Enter `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`If assistant recognizes`}</inlineCode>{` with a value `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`#SPL_See_The_Case_Notes_Link`}</inlineCode>{` from the intent created above.`}</li>
          <li parentName="ul">{`Enter the `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`Then set context`}</inlineCode>{` variable names and values used within this node to create a link. In this example set the following context variables:`}</li>
        </ul>
        <table parentName="li">
          <thead parentName="table">
            <tr parentName="thead">
              <th parentName="tr" {...{
                "align": null
              }}>{`Context variable  name`}</th>
              <th parentName="tr" {...{
                "align": null
              }}>{`Value`}</th>
              <th parentName="tr" {...{
                "align": null
              }}>{`Description`}</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody parentName="table">
            <tr parentName="tbody">
              <td parentName="tr" {...{
                "align": null
              }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`uim`}</inlineCode></td>
              <td parentName="tr" {...{
                "align": null
              }}>{`Person_listNote`}</td>
              <td parentName="tr" {...{
                "align": null
              }}>{`The uim link for a persons notes list page.`}</td>
            </tr>
            <tr parentName="tbody">
              <td parentName="tr" {...{
                "align": null
              }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`concernRoleID`}</inlineCode></td>
              <td parentName="tr" {...{
                "align": null
              }}>{`$personID`}</td>
              <td parentName="tr" {...{
                "align": null
              }}>{`The page parameter name and value required for the url to access the application page.`}</td>
            </tr>
            <tr parentName="tbody">
              <td parentName="tr" {...{
                "align": null
              }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`preferredTabList`}</inlineCode></td>
              <td parentName="tr" {...{
                "align": null
              }}>{`PersonHome`}</td>
              <td parentName="tr" {...{
                "align": null
              }}>{`The `}<inlineCode parentName="td">{`preferredTabList`}</inlineCode>{` defines the navigation tab required to navigate to the correct page where there are multiple paths to access this page within the application.`}</td>
            </tr>
            <tr parentName="tbody">
              <td parentName="tr" {...{
                "align": null
              }}><inlineCode parentName="td">{`pretext`}</inlineCode></td>
              <td parentName="tr" {...{
                "align": null
              }}></td>
              <td parentName="tr" {...{
                "align": null
              }}>{`The text shown before a link within the chatbot. If there is no pretext the value is empty.`}</td>
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ol">
        <p parentName="li">{`Select to open the JSON editor`}</p>
        <ul parentName="li">
          <li parentName="ul">{`The context variables defined above can be viewed and edited within the JSON definition.`}</li>
          <li parentName="ul">{`Add the `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`user_defined`}</inlineCode>{` JSON object as shown below in the code extract. The parameters are defined within the JSON `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`user_defined`}</inlineCode>{` properties including `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`path`}</inlineCode>{`, `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`response_body`}</inlineCode>{` and `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`preferred_tab_list`}</inlineCode>{`.`}</li>
          <li parentName="ul">{`The full context pattern `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`<?context['<context variable name>']?>`}</inlineCode>{` is used for text variables or the short place holder format where the attribute is preceded by the dollar character `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`$`}</inlineCode>{`.
For example `}<inlineCode parentName="li">{`$<context variable name>`}</inlineCode>{` is used to hold an attribute value. The attributes are then inserted in to the user defined property values at run time.`}</li>
        </ul>
        <pre parentName="li"><code parentName="pre" {...{}}>{`     {
        "output": {
            "generic": [
              {
                "user_defined": {
                    "name": "responseWithNavigation",
                    "path": "<?context['uim']?>?concernRoleID=$personID",
                    "action_text": "See client notes for $personFullName",
                    "response_body": "<?context['pretext']?>",
                    "preferred_tabs_list": "<?context['preferredTabList']?>"
                },
                "response_type": "user_defined"
              }
            ]
        },
        "context": {
            "uim": "Person_listNote",
            "pretext": "",
            "concernRoleID": "$personID",
            "personFullName": "$personFullName",
            "preferredTabList": "PersonHome"
        }
     }
`}</code></pre>
      </li>
    </ol>
    <ul>
      <li parentName="ul">
        <p parentName="li">{`Open the calling dialog node and select ‘Jump to’ from the dropdown in the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`Then assistant should`}</inlineCode>{` section. Select the node `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`#SPL_See_The_Case_Notes_Link`}</inlineCode>{` created above to jump to.`}</p>
      </li>
      <li parentName="ul">
        <p parentName="li">{`Test the link in the running application and validate the link opens the correct page in the application.`}</p>
      </li>
    </ul>
    <p>{`Alternatively the links can be added to the JSON Editor response body or returned as a parameter from a Cloud Function action.
The parameter values to create the links can be user input, values returned from a Cloud Function action or values defined as context variables set in other dialog nodes.`}</p>

    </MDXLayout>;

;
